name: who-is-adam
description: Self-contained desk and academic manuscript review skill for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Installs the Who is ADAM skill for direct desk checks, multi-perspective manuscript review, adversarial deliberation, and evidence-grounded Markdown output. Python pipeline diagnostics are optional.
defaultPrompt: Use $who-is-adam to review this local academic paper PDF.
Use $who-is-adam in desk-only mode on this submission.
Use $who-is-adam to focus on this paper's methodology.
